title: citrus × oliveri
intro: Citrus × oliveri, also known as the orange jessamine or mock orange, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the Rutaceae family and is a cross between the orange and the jasmine. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, colds, and digestive issues due to its antiviral, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Citrus × oliveri include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and improve respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Citrus × oliveri include teas, infusions, and essential oils that can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
